[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 01001000 2
4 11001010 4
5 10001010 3
6 00110001 3
7 01110111 6

01 10 11001010 4 match 4
12 21 10111011 6
23 32 01110111 6 match 7
34 43 01110111 6 match 7
45 54 01010111 5
56 65 01101011 5
67 76 01101100 4
70 07 11001110 5

02 20 11111011 7
13 31 11111111 a
24 42 00110101 4
35 53 01110111 6 match 7
46 64 01111100 5
57 75 01001111 5
60 06 11101010 5
71 17 11001110 5

03 30 11111111 a
14 41 10011110 5
25 52 01110011 5
36 63 01111111 7
47 74 01011100 4
50 05 11001011 5
61 16 11101010 5
72 27 01111101 6

04 40 11011110 6
15 51 11001011 5
26 62 01111001 5
37 73 01111111 7
[completion]
